title: Uncompressed Blocks
description: Why can you craft compressed blocks but you cant decompress them? This datapack fixes that
body:
# Uncompressed Blocks
Why can you craft compressed blocks but you cant decompress them? This datapack fixes that.

### What this datapack adds
- Crafting Recipes
  - Amethyst Block -> 4 Amethyst Shards
  - Dripstone Block -> 4 Pointed Dripstone
  - Magma Block -> 4 Magma Cream
  - Nether Wart Block -> 9 Nether Wart
  - Purpur Block -> 1 Popped Chorus Fruit
  - Quartz Block -> 4 Nether Quartz
